GlowLab Vitamin C Serum

Published January 15, 2026 by the GlowLab team.

Our vitamin C serum brightens skin in 14 days. It combines 15 percent L-ascorbic acid with hyaluronic acid and vitamin E for a stable, effective formula that works on every skin tone. Clinically tested and cruelty free.

Why it works

L-ascorbic acid is the most studied form of vitamin C. At 15 percent concentration with a pH of 3.2, it penetrates the skin barrier and inhibits melanin production, which fades dark spots and evens tone over two to four weeks of daily use.

How long until I see results?

Most customers see brighter skin within 14 days of daily morning use. Full results on dark spots appear after six to eight weeks.

Is the serum safe for sensitive skin?

Yes. The formula is fragrance free, dermatologist tested, and buffered to minimize irritation. Patch test first if you have reactive skin.

What customers say

Rated 4.8 out of 5 across 3,200 reviews. "The first serum that actually faded my acne marks," writes one verified buyer.
